Class Store

java.lang.Object
store.Store
public class Store extends Object
Class name: Store

Description: It implements the store

    • getStoreProductFromId

      public StoreProduct getStoreProductFromId(String productId)
      It gets a store product from its id
      Parameters:
      productId - the desired store product's id
      Returns:
      the desired product

      Returns:
      the desired product

      public int getProductId()
      It returns the id of the next product to be created and updates the counter
      Returns:
      the new product's id

    • isCategoryInStore

      public boolean isCategoryInStore(String name)
      Obtains whether a category exists in the store
      Parameters:
      name - , the name of the category
      Returns:
      true if the category exists, false if else
